none.justification: Matches the GT on the ops instance `e1000e_netdev_ops` at `netdev.c:7327`, `.ndo_start_xmit = e1000_xmit_frame` at `7330` with definition at `5781`, and assignment in `e1000_probe` at `7451`. The `e1000_probe` start line is off by two, within accepted drift.

codegraph.justification: Correctly identifies `e1000e_netdev_ops`, `e1000_xmit_frame` at `netdev.c:5781`, and the registration assignment at `netdev.c:7451` inside `e1000_probe`.
